entries.reason: Story, Architecture, Specs, Design SSOT, scanner, CLI/check report, operator Skill, and regression tests implement one inseparable contract; splitting would create a temporarily false or unreachable public contract. No unrelated Story or repository-control change is included.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
